authorization.qualification: ADR 0001 normatively requires every public CertificateProfileId construction path to enforce the whole-string grammar, so explicit null is outside the grammar. REQ-X509-PROFILE-INTEGRITY-014 is related but its malformed expected-ID examples do not explicitly enumerate null.
